name: ai-office-worker
description: AI Office Worker — SaaS for Gmail, invoices, Drive, WhatsApp (Israel)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.deploy:check: npm run db:generate -w backend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
